headline: SLAMCORE SECURES $14M, BACKED BY INVESTORS INCLUDING ROCKWELL AUTOMATION, TO SCALE VISUAL AI ACROSS INTRALOGISTICS
summary: Slamcore, a leader in spatial intelligence software, today announced a $14 million funding round from top investors, including ROKStar Ventures, a subsidiary of Rockwell Automation, a global leader in industrial automation and digital transformation. The round brings Slamcore's total funding to $40M, with backing from investors including Toyota Ventures, Interwoven Ventures, MMC Ventures, Amadeus Capital Partners and IP Group.
